note: v301: Statements reconcile — clearer visual hierarchy. The two 'needs action' buckets (On the bank / In your books) are now elevated and only shown when they actually have items; a fully-matched month collapses to a single green 'Everything's matched' line instead of two empty cards. Matched, Find any record, Set aside and Pending moved into a flat, collapsible reference zone below (the finder auto-opens only when the month still needs attention), so a loaded month reads primary-first at a glance.
